The trail
doesn't care.

Neither
does
the bike.

780g Frame weight
T700 Carbon grade
15K Test kilometres
47 Chosen components
The Build

Every
part
earned
its place.

Nothing came with the frame. Each component was selected, tested under load, and replaced until it held at this standard. This is what went back in.

Groupset
Shimano Dura-Ace
12-speed. Electronic actuation. 1ms shift response under full load.
Brakes
Hydraulic Disc
160mm rotor. Identical feel in wet, mud, and sustained heat.
Wheels
Carbon 45mm
Tubeless ready. 1,380g the pair. Ceramic bearing hubs throughout.
Cockpit
Carbon Bar / Stem
Integrated, internally routed. Matched to frame stiffness profile.
Saddle
Carbon Rail
Pressure-mapped to three anatomical profiles across 2,000 test hours.
Tyres
28c Tubeless
60tpi casing. Integrated puncture belt. Compound-matched to the rim.
Limited — End of Season
